surfaces.selector_note: Selectors should prefer labelled controls over layout positions in the synthetic candidate.
surfaces.manual_handoff_reason: Fixture evidence is sufficient for read-only observation refresh review.
surfaces.redaction_reason: Fixture includes labels only and no applicant, address, credential, or account values.

surfaces.selector_note: Status labels require reviewer confirmation before any live selector promotion.
surfaces.manual_handoff_reason: Fixture indicates dynamic status labels that need attended review.
surfaces.redaction_reason: Candidate must remain synthetic and omit case identifiers.
